privileged_info_summary: The task instructions and target state are synthetically generated based on the prompt. The expected pages ('Welcome to Greenfield Library', 'Library News', 'Catalog', 'Digital Collections', 'Events & Programs', 'About Us'), target menu name ('Main Navigation'), menu location ('primary'), and the static front page setting ('page') exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the task description and are dynamically enforced via verifier.py.
